catalogOverview.description: The LuvOnPurpose Academy offers comprehensive training programs designed to build skills, develop leadership, and prepare individuals for success in building generational wealth. Our courses blend practical knowledge with our L.A.W.S. framework values.

audienceTypes.description: Employees of The L.A.W.S. Collective and subsidiary entities
Community members participating in L.A.W.S. programs
Open enrollment courses available to the general public

deliveryFormats.description: Complete at your own pace with video lessons, readings, and assessments
Live sessions via Microsoft Teams with real-time interaction
Combination of self-paced modules and live sessions

courseCategories.description: Core courses that introduce our organization, mission, and culture

courses.title: Welcome to The L.A.W.S. Collective
courses.shortDescription: An introduction to our organization, mission, and the L.A.W.S. framework.
courses.fullDescription: This foundational course welcomes new team members to The L.A.W.S. Collective family. You'll hear directly from our Founder about the vision that drives our work, learn the history of how our organization came to be, and gain a deep understanding of the L.A.W.S. framework (Land, Air, Water, Self) that guides everything we do. By the end of this course, you'll understand how your role contributes to our mission of building generational wealth for our community.
learningObjectives: Articulate the mission and vision of The L.A.W.S. Collective
Explain each element of the L.A.W.S. framework
Describe the organizational structure and how entities work together
Identify how your role supports the overall mission

courses.title: Understanding Our Entities
courses.shortDescription: Learn about each entity in our organizational family and how they work together.
courses.fullDescription: Our organization operates through multiple entities, each with a specific purpose and mission. This course provides an in-depth look at The L.A.W.S. Collective (our holding company), LAWS, LLC (our autonomous wealth platform), Real-Eye-Nation LLC (our media and narrative arm), and LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society (our education and community impact organization). You'll understand how these entities collaborate, share resources, and collectively work toward our vision.
learningObjectives: Describe the purpose and function of each organizational entity
Explain the relationship between the holding company and subsidiaries
Identify which entity handles specific functions
Understand how shared services support all entities

courses.title: Token Economy and Ownership Model
courses.shortDescription: Understand how our unique compensation and ownership model works.
courses.fullDescription: What makes us different? Our commitment to shared ownership and wealth building. This course explains our innovative token economy, how employees earn ownership stakes, and the path from traditional W-2 employment to independent contractor status. You'll learn how performance translates to token earnings, what ownership means for your long-term wealth, and how this model supports our mission of generational wealth building.
learningObjectives: Explain how the token economy functions
Describe how ownership stakes are earned and accumulated
Understand the W-2 to contractor transition path
Calculate potential token earnings based on performance

courseCategories.description: Required courses covering policies, ethics, and regulatory compliance

courses.title: Code of Conduct and Ethics
courses.shortDescription: Our standards for professional behavior and ethical decision-making.
courses.fullDescription: Integrity is the foundation of everything we do. This course covers our Code of Conduct, ethical guidelines, and expectations for professional behavior. You'll learn how to navigate ethical dilemmas, understand conflict of interest policies, and know how to report concerns. Through real-world scenarios, you'll practice applying our ethical standards to workplace situations.
learningObjectives: Identify key elements of our Code of Conduct
Recognize potential ethical dilemmas and conflicts of interest
Know how and when to report concerns

courses.title: Data Security and Confidentiality
courses.shortDescription: Protecting sensitive information and maintaining data security.
courses.fullDescription: In our work, we handle sensitive information about our organization, team members, and community. This course teaches you how to protect that information, maintain confidentiality, and follow security best practices. You'll learn about password security, recognizing phishing attempts, handling confidential documents, and what to do if you suspect a data breach.
learningObjectives: Apply security best practices for passwords and access
Recognize and respond to security threats

courses.title: Workplace Harassment Prevention
courses.shortDescription: Creating and maintaining a respectful, harassment-free workplace.
courses.fullDescription: Everyone deserves a workplace free from harassment and discrimination. This course helps you understand what constitutes harassment, how to prevent it, and what to do if you experience or witness inappropriate behavior. You'll learn about different types of harassment, bystander intervention techniques, and our reporting procedures.
learningObjectives: Define harassment and discrimination in the workplace

courses.title: Grant Compliance Fundamentals
courses.shortDescription: Understanding grant requirements and maintaining compliance.
courses.fullDescription: As a grant-funded organization, compliance is critical to our sustainability. This course provides an overview of grant compliance requirements, documentation standards, and your role in maintaining compliance. Whether you work directly with grants or not, understanding these requirements helps ensure our continued ability to serve our community.
learningObjectives: Identify common grant requirements and restrictions
Document activities appropriately for grant reporting
Know when to escalate compliance questions
requiredFor: All employees working on grant-funded activities

courseCategories.description: Training on the systems and tools used in daily work

courses.title: Communication and Collaboration Tools
courses.shortDescription: Master Microsoft Teams, email, and our collaboration platforms.
courses.fullDescription: Effective communication is essential for our distributed team. This hands-on course teaches you to use Microsoft Teams for messaging, meetings, and collaboration. You'll also learn email best practices, document sharing protocols, and how to stay connected with your team regardless of location.

courses.title: Project Management Fundamentals
courses.shortDescription: Learn to track projects, manage tasks, and meet deadlines.
courses.fullDescription: Whether you're managing projects or contributing to them, understanding project management basics helps you work more effectively. This course covers task management, milestone tracking, status reporting, and using our project management tools to stay organized and on track.

courses.title: Document Management and Organization
courses.shortDescription: Organize files, manage documents, and maintain records effectively.
courses.fullDescription: Good document management saves time and ensures important information is always accessible. This course teaches our file organization standards, naming conventions, version control practices, and how to use our shared drives effectively. You'll also learn about record retention requirements.

courseCategories.description: Courses for current and aspiring leaders

courses.title: Leadership at L.A.W.S.
courses.shortDescription: Our approach to leadership and building high-performing teams.
courses.fullDescription: Leadership at L.A.W.S. is about service, empowerment, and building others up. This course introduces our leadership philosophy, rooted in the L.A.W.S. framework. You'll learn how to lead by example, build trust with your team, and create an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to our mission.
learningObjectives: Build trust and psychological safety in teams
Lead by example aligned with L.A.W.S. values

courses.title: Managing Remote Teams
courses.shortDescription: Strategies for leading distributed and remote team members.
courses.fullDescription: Our team works across locations, making remote leadership skills essential. This course covers communication strategies for remote teams, building culture without physical presence, managing performance from a distance, and maintaining team cohesion. You'll learn practical techniques that work in our virtual environment.
learningObjectives: Communicate effectively with remote team members
Build and maintain team culture virtually
Manage performance in a remote environment

courses.title: Coaching and Development
courses.shortDescription: Develop your team through effective coaching conversations.
courses.fullDescription: Great leaders develop other leaders. This course teaches coaching techniques that help team members grow, improve performance, and reach their potential. You'll learn how to have effective coaching conversations, give constructive feedback, create development plans, and mentor others on their career journey.
learningObjectives: Provide constructive feedback that drives improvement

courses.title: Decision Making and Problem Solving
courses.shortDescription: Frameworks for making sound decisions and solving complex problems.
courses.fullDescription: Leaders face decisions every day, often with incomplete information. This course provides frameworks for analyzing problems, gathering input, making decisions, and communicating them effectively. You'll practice with real-world scenarios and develop your decision-making confidence.
learningObjectives: Gather and evaluate input from stakeholders
Communicate decisions clearly and build buy-in

courses.title: Budget and Resource Management
courses.shortDescription: Managing department budgets and allocating resources effectively.
courses.fullDescription: Department leaders are stewards of organizational resources. This course covers budget development, monitoring spending, resource allocation, and financial reporting. You'll learn to make data-driven resource decisions and communicate financial information to leadership.

courseCategories.description: Courses on personal finance, business finance, and wealth building

courses.title: Financial Foundations
courses.shortDescription: Build a strong foundation in personal financial management.
courses.fullDescription: Financial literacy is the first step toward generational wealth. This course covers budgeting basics, understanding credit, managing debt, and building savings. Whether you're just starting your financial journey or looking to strengthen your foundation, this course provides practical tools you can use immediately.
learningObjectives: Create and maintain a personal budget
Understand credit scores and how to improve them

courses.title: Business Finance Essentials
courses.shortDescription: Understand business finances for entrepreneurs and business owners.
courses.fullDescription: Ready to start or grow a business? This course covers essential business finance concepts including business budgeting, cash flow management, understanding financial statements, and planning for profitability. Designed for aspiring and current entrepreneurs.
learningObjectives: Create and manage a business budget

courses.title: Building Generational Wealth
courses.shortDescription: Strategies for creating and preserving wealth across generations.
courses.fullDescription: Generational wealth is at the heart of our mission. This advanced course explores strategies for building wealth that lasts beyond your lifetime. Topics include investment fundamentals, real estate, business ownership, estate planning basics, and teaching financial literacy to the next generation.
learningObjectives: Develop a long-term wealth building strategy
Create a plan for transferring wealth to future generations

courseCategories.description: Courses on starting and growing businesses

courses.title: LLC Formation Fundamentals
courses.shortDescription: Learn how to properly form and structure a Limited Liability Company.
courses.fullDescription: Thinking about starting a business? An LLC is often the best structure for new entrepreneurs. This comprehensive course walks you through the entire LLC formation process, from choosing a name to filing paperwork to setting up your operating agreement. You'll leave with a clear roadmap for forming your own LLC.
learningObjectives: Understand the benefits and limitations of LLC structure
Complete the LLC formation process step-by-step
Set up proper business banking and records

courses.title: Business Plan Development
courses.shortDescription: Create a comprehensive business plan for your venture.
courses.fullDescription: A solid business plan is your roadmap to success. This hands-on course guides you through creating a complete business plan, including market analysis, financial projections, marketing strategy, and operational planning. By the end, you'll have a professional business plan ready for lenders, investors, or your own guidance.
learningObjectives: Conduct market research and competitive analysis
Create a marketing and sales strategy
Write a complete, professional business plan

courses.title: Trust Fundamentals for Families
courses.shortDescription: Understanding trusts as tools for asset protection and wealth transfer.
courses.fullDescription: Trusts are powerful tools for protecting assets and transferring wealth across generations. This course demystifies trusts, explaining different types, their benefits, and how families can use them strategically. Note: This is educational content, not legal advice. Participants are encouraged to work with qualified attorneys for their specific situations.
learningObjectives: Understand what trusts are and how they work
Identify different types of trusts and their purposes
Recognize when a trust might benefit your family
Know what questions to ask when working with attorneys

courseCategories.description: Programs based on the Land, Air, Water, Self framework

courses.title: LAND: Reconnection & Stability
courses.shortDescription: Reconnect with your roots and build a foundation of stability.
courses.fullDescription: The LAND pillar focuses on understanding where you come from and building stability in your life. This program helps participants explore their family history, understand migrations and cultural heritage, and create stability through connection to place and community. Through reflection, research, and community activities, you'll strengthen your foundation.
learningObjectives: Understand the impact of historical migrations
Connect with cultural heritage and traditions

courses.title: AIR: Education & Knowledge
courses.shortDescription: Expand your knowledge and develop your capacity for learning.
courses.fullDescription: The AIR pillar emphasizes education, learning, and the free flow of knowledge. This program helps participants develop learning strategies, improve communication skills, and create a personal education plan. Whether you're pursuing formal education or self-directed learning, this program will help you breathe in knowledge and share it with others.
courses.assessment: Personal education plan + peer teaching demonstration

courses.title: WATER: Healing & Balance
courses.shortDescription: Develop emotional resilience and restore balance in your life.
courses.fullDescription: The WATER pillar focuses on healing, emotional resilience, and finding balance. This program provides a supportive space to address emotional challenges, develop healthy coping strategies, and create balance in your life. Through reflection, group support, and practical techniques, you'll learn to flow through life's challenges with greater ease.

courses.title: SELF: Purpose & Skills
courses.shortDescription: Discover your purpose and build practical skills for success.
courses.fullDescription: The SELF pillar is about understanding who you are and developing the skills to achieve your purpose. This program helps participants identify their strengths, clarify their purpose, and build practical skills for financial literacy, business readiness, and purposeful growth. You'll leave with a clear vision and actionable plan for your future.

courses.title: Complete L.A.W.S. Journey
courses.shortDescription: The full L.A.W.S. experience - all four pillars in one comprehensive program.
courses.fullDescription: Ready for transformation? The Complete L.A.W.S. Journey takes participants through all four pillars in a comprehensive 24-week program. This cohort-based experience builds community, provides accountability, and guides participants through deep personal development. Graduates emerge with clarity, skills, and a supportive network for their journey ahead.
learningObjectives: Develop a comprehensive personal development plan
Prepare for next steps in wealth building

internal.description: Required for all employees within first 2 weeks
Required for all employees, renewed annually
Required for all employees within first 2 weeks

community.description: Build financial literacy and business finance skills
Prepare to start your own business
Complete the full L.A.W.S. Journey program
